notes: 4 HRB insgral PDFs, each 1 page. Each is a separate inspection document (LCH-series forms with diverse templates). The PaginationScanner applies A7 lock: every single-page PDF counts as 1 document without OCR. Total = 4. Note: real corpus insgral PDFs use centered pagination stamps (not upper-right corner), so corner_count returns 0 for multi-page compilations; A7 is the operative path for these 1-page files.
